label: Upgrade Cards
summary: XP fills a bar, level-up pauses the game, player picks one of three upgrades.

label: Enemy Variety
summary: Enemy set includes fast, tank, charger, splitter, and elite behavior.

label: Risk Reward
summary: High-value rewards appear near danger or in risky lanes.

label: Combo Streak
summary: Repeated success raises a multiplier until the player is hit.

label: Trust Pressure
summary: A trust meter drains over time and drops on weak or wrong interpretations.

label: Contradiction Mark
summary: Wrong readings create a visible penalty, time loss, shake, and red feedback.

label: Tower Placement
summary: Player spends currency to place towers on fixed build nodes.

label: Wave Defense
summary: Enemies arrive in timed waves and damage the base if they cross the route.

label: Card Energy
summary: Each turn gives limited energy that constrains which cards can be played.

label: Card Combo
summary: Playing compatible cards in sequence creates extra damage, shield, or score.

label: Match Chain
summary: Clearing large groups creates score chains and floating feedback.

label: Board Clear
summary: The board refills after cleared tiles and rewards sustained cleanup.

label: Arc Aim
summary: Pointer drag sets launch direction and power for a projectile.

label: Limited Shots
summary: Limited shots make each release a risk/reward decision.

label: Beat Timing
summary: Tap close to the hit line for perfect/good/miss timing results.

label: Platform Jump
summary: Player moves and jumps between platforms while avoiding hazards.

label: Rising Pressure
summary: Platforms scroll and a bottom danger zone pressures upward movement.

label: Production Loop
summary: Stations produce currency over time and become stronger through upgrades.

label: Bottleneck Upgrade
summary: Random bottlenecks slow production until the player spends to clear them.

label: Grid Move
summary: Player moves one tile per turn on a compact grid.

label: Area Control
summary: Tiles can be sealed or controlled to slow enemy spread.

label: Merge Grow
summary: Dropping equal tiles merges them into a higher value with chain scoring.

label: Tile Tray
summary: Tap stacked tiles into a seven-slot tray; three of a kind clear.

label: Paddle Bounce
summary: A pointer paddle bounces a ball to break brick rows.

label: Tap Flap
summary: Tap to flap a flyer through scrolling pipe gaps.
